violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. -Repair gap in filters on hood.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Ice machine needs cleaned inside.
General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. -Back door has gap at bottom.
